summary: The video shows a snowy urban street with multiple vehicles traveling in both directions. Snowbanks line the sides of the road, and buildings flank the roadway. Vehicles are seen moving steadily along the road, maintaining their lanes.

events_timeline.event: Multiple cars are seen traveling on a snowy urban street, maintaining their lanes and speeds.

uncertainties: Exact positions and velocities of all vehicles cannot be determined due to limited frame resolution.

risk_assessment.why: All vehicles appear to be operating normally without any observable collisions, near misses, or erratic behaviors.
